displayTitle: Star Wars (1977) #39: The Empire Strikes Back: Beginning
synopsis: The Rebel Alliance has established a new base on the ice planet Hoth, but an Imperial probe droid discovers the location and transmits the data before it can be destroyed. Luke Skywalker, attacked by a wampa and dragged to its cave, escapes and, with Han Solo's help, returns to Echo Base. Captain Piett relays the probe droid's signal to Darth Vader, who immediately orders the fleet to the Hoth system.
title: Star Wars (1977) #39: The Empire Strikes Back: Beginning
